mapper.sql: t.id, t.ticket_no, t.title, t.description, t.category_id, t.priority, t.status, t.submitter_id, t.assignee_id, t.assigned_at, t.resolved_at, t.closed_at, t.due_at, t.source, t.ai_summary, t.created_at, t.updated_at, t.deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM ticket t
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM ticket t WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0
